compiled_state.title: As a developer, I can configure Figma API access and provide a design URL for pull-back
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Figma URL parsing (supports /design/, /file/, /proto/ formats), file key extraction and storage on ticket, PAT configuration in dso-config.conf with env-var fallback, and PAT validation on first use.
**Why**: Establishes the authenticated connection to Figma that all downstream pull operations depend on.
**Scope**:
- IN: URL parsing for multiple Figma URL formats, file key extraction + ticket storage, design.figma_pat config key with FIGMA_PAT env-var fallback, PAT validation (GET /v1/me returns 200), 401 handling with re-provisioning instructions, config key registration in dso-config.conf documentation
- OUT: REST API data retrieval (S2), merge algorithm (S3), re-sync orchestration (S4)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, providing a Figma URL in any supported format (/design/, /file/, /proto/) extracts the file key and stores it on the ticket for subsequent operations
  ← Satisfies: "file key extracted from the URL and stored on the ticket"
- When this story is complete, PAT is read from design.figma_pat in dso-config.conf with fallback to FIGMA_PAT environment variable; missing PAT produces a clear error with configuration instructions
  ← Satisfies: "PAT configured in dso-config.conf with env-var fallback"
- When this story is complete, PAT is validated on first use via GET /v1/me; 401 response produces clear error with re-provisioning instructions including 90-day expiry notice
  ← Satisfies: "PAT auth via dso-config.conf"
- When this story is complete, the design.figma_pat config key is registered in dso-config.conf documentation and accepted by validate-config.sh without warnings
  ← Satisfies: adversarial review finding on config key registration
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Security] PAT in config — env-var fallback prevents accidental VCS exposure
- [Integration] Verified: PAT auth works, 90-day max expiry, file_content:read scope required

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.

comments.body: COMPLETION VERIFIER (inline): DD1 PASS — figma-url-parse.sh extracts keys for /design/, /file/, /proto/ formats. DD2 PASS — figma-auth.sh reads PAT from FIGMA_PAT env var with design.figma_pat config fallback. DD3 PASS — validate-config.sh accepts design.figma_pat without warnings. DD4 PASS — CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents design.figma_pat with description, accepted values, default, used-by. All tasks closed. Unit tests (integration): FP-URL-1..4 + FP-AUTH-1..3 all pass.
comments.author: Test
